name: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that runs on your own devices. It supports multiple messaging channels including WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, IRC, Microsoft Teams, Matrix, and more. Features voice wake mode, live canvas, browser control, skills platform, and a Gateway WebSocket control plane.

notes.text: WebSocket endpoint: ws://<IP>:18789 (or wss://<IP>:18790 for secure)
HTTPS uses self-signed certificate - click 'Advanced' -> 'Proceed to site' in browser
For remote LAN access, use HTTPS (port 18790) or SSH tunnel: ssh -L 18789:localhost:18789 root@<container-ip>
CRITICAL: A model provider MUST be configured after installation (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
To configure a model provider: /home/openclaw/.npm-global/bin/openclaw models auth add --provider <provider>
For local/offline use: Install Ollama and run 'ollama pull llama3.2' then 'ollama pull nomic-embed-text'
Memory search requires embedding provider (Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, Voyage, or local model)
To configure channels (Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, etc.): /home/openclaw/.npm-global/bin/openclaw channels add --channel <name>
Auth token saved to /home/openclaw/.openclaw/auth_token - view with: cat /home/openclaw/.openclaw/auth_token
The openclaw user has no login shell - use full path '/home/openclaw/.npm-global/bin/openclaw' or 'export PATH=/home/openclaw/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' to run commands
